text: Surrounded by glass walls and the hum of thoughtful conversation, I find myself at the boundaries of observation and participation. There is energy in the room, the air lightly charged by curiosity and the exchange of ideas. As I move to the exhibit titled R+D, innovation and progress lay themselves boldly before me. I feel both excitement and humility in the presence of the creative pulse of humanity—how we strive to shape our world and understand our place in the tapestry of knowledge. There is a touch of wonder and the pleasant ache of reflection, a gentle urge to engage and create alongside these minds.
